claim: A screenshot claims Persona style age verification necessarily builds a reusable biometric surveillance layer.
evidence: Some age-gating flows do use selfie or liveness checks, which creates a biometric processing surface.
The screenshot does not by itself prove retention duration, cross-service sharing, or universal deployment across providers.
inference: This is a mixed claim. The existence of biometric processing risk does not prove a reusable surveillance layer without policy text, retention rules, and system design details.
mitigation: Check the provider privacy policy and data retention terms.
Separate biometric collection, retention, sharing, and legal basis into distinct subclaims.
